prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约11639→12175→12049→11629→12829名，整体在1.16万–1.28万之间窄幅波动，近5年最大波动幅度约1200名；2025年基准位次 约12829名，较2024年明显后移约1200名，反映当年竞争加剧；该校在江苏物理类招生计划波动较大：2021年6人、2022年7人、2023年4人、2024年15人、2025年 6人；2026年计划大幅扩招至60人，较2025年增长900%，为历年最大扩幅，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 排名约第28名（2026年），近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，属国内顶尖高校梯队；盘锦校区与主校区共享985品牌声誉；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断 档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年曾出现电信学部断档至60000名的记录，对报考心理有一定滞后影响；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等10个学科获评A-及以上，学科实力雄厚；盘锦校区招生专业中能 源化学工程对应化学工程与技术A+，经济学类对应工商管理A。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
能源化学工程属化工大类（社会热度分化观望），经济学类属财经大类（分化观望），中 外合作办学专业学费较高（85000元/年）可能降低部分考生意愿；2026年江苏物理类考生约37.96万人（估算），较2025年26.06万人增长约45.7%，竞争基数显著扩大；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，属东北地区，对江苏考生存在一定地域距离感。
8. 【预测结论】综合历年位次波动、2026年计划大幅扩招（900%）与江苏物理类考生大幅增加（约45.7%）的供需双向变化，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，竞争压力显著缓解；同时985品 牌效应和学科优势对位次形成一定支撑。预测2026年物理类最低位次约75106名，区间74600–75600名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 智能海洋装备
- 海洋技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（电子商务、经济学）
- 生物制造
- 生物信息学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境生态工程（中外合作，85000元/年）
- 药学（中外合作，85000元/年）
- 应用化学（中外合作，85000元/年）
- 数理基础科学（中外合作，85000元/年）
- 过程装备与控制工程（中外合作，85000元/年）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（74600–75600名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业适当冲刺、三档中外合作专业作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<74600名）可重点冲击 能源化学工程等A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>75600名）建议优先考虑中外合作办学专业，利用高学费门槛实现低分进985。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11639 → 12175 → 12049 → 11629 → 12829, fluctuating narrowly between 11,600 and 12,800, with a maximum fluctuation of about 1,200 places in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12,829, significantly shifting back by about 1,200 places compared to 2024, reflecting intensified competition that year; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu for Physics Category fluctuated greatly: 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan drastically expands to 60, a 900% increase from 2025, the largest expansion in history, significantly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 28th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), stable in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the Panjin Campus shares the 985 brand reputation with the main campus; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving admission gaps or abnormal cutoff score signals; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 55th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; in 2023, there was a record of the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering dropping to 60,000th place, which has a lagging psychological impact on applications; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ (national top), Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, and 10 other disciplines rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength; the Panjin Campus enrollment majors include Energy Chemical Engineering corresponding to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, and Economics category corresponding to Business Administration A.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Energy Chemical Engineering belongs to the chemical engineering category (social popularity divided and wait-and-see), Economics category belongs to the finance and economics category (divided and wait-and-see), Sino-foreign cooperative education majors have high tuition fees (85,000 yuan/year) which may reduce some candidates' willingness; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu is approximately 379,600 (estimated), an increase of about 45.7% from 260,600 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; the university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region, which creates a certain geographical distance for Jiangsu candidates.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (900%) and the substantial increase in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates (about 45.7%), the expansion far exceeds the candidate increase, significantly alleviating competitive pressure; at the same time, the 985 brand effect and disciplinary advantages provide some support for rankings. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 75,106, with a range of 74,600–75,600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment
- Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics Category (E-commerce, Economics)
- Biomanufacturing
- Bioinformatics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Ecological Engineering (Sino-foreign cooperative, 85,000 yuan/year)
- Pharmacy (Sino-foreign cooperative, 85,000 yuan/year)
- Applied Chemistry (Sino-foreign cooperative, 85,000 yuan/year)
- Mathematical and Physical Sciences (Sino-foreign cooperative, 85,000 yuan/year)
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering (Sino-foreign cooperative, 85,000 yuan/year).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (74,600–75,600), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, appropriately aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 Sino-foreign cooperative majors as a safe backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<74,600), you can focus on aiming for A+ discipline majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>75,600), it is recommended to prioritize Sino-foreign cooperative majors, using the high tuition threshold to enter a 985 university with a lower score.
